quoteLast: he was aware of a rustling train's rush down the steps, and now was like a man with his neck on the block, awaiting the axe.
title: The Lord of the Sea
author: Shiel, M. P. (Matthew Phipps), 1865-1947

quoteFirst: And on the same dates, daybreak occurs at 4:58, 4:35, and
quoteLast: , and end of evening twilight at 7:27, 7:43, and 8:03 p.
title: The Chautauquan, Vol. 04, March 1884, No. 6
